title: Nursing gig work at Attendo in the Ylä-Savo region
salary_range: salary a task-specific supplement based on the
meta_description: Attendo Oy is looking for a skilled Nursing gig work at Attendo in the Ylä-Savo region in Lapinlahti. Don't miss this opportunity—apply today.
description: Attendo is seeking experienced caregivers to join their team in the Ylä-Savo region, offering full-time permanent employment with competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements. The company provides a rotating gig worker model and supports development opportunities for long-term substitutes or permanent positions. Interested candidates should have a degree in social and health fields, completed practical nursing studies, and be vaccinated against infectious diseases to protect residents. Attendo offers comprehensive training and career advancement options while maintaining a smoke-free workplace environment. For more information or to apply, please contact the recruitment coordinator at Jenna Niskanenjenna.niskanen@attendo.fi.
what_we_expect: Degree in the social and health field or you are a field student, at least two parts of the degree have been completed in practical nursing studies
Vaccination protection as referred to in Section 48 of the Infectious Diseases Act to protect customers and patients for the entire duration of the employment
Fluent Finnish language skills, at least level B1.1
job_responsibilities: You can choose how many shifts you do - this way you can fit the work in, for example, with another job, study or family leave side by side.
We commit to a paid orientation at the beginning of the employment relationship.
what_we_offer: We walk by your side With Attendo, your predecessor is not far away, but present in everyday life, supporting and walking by your side.
With us, you are an important part of the multiprofessional team that makes the home a home for our residents. We support your development.
You can choose how many shifts you do - this way you can fit the work in, for example, with another job, study or family leave side by side.
search_keywords: care industry, nursing gig work, Attendo Oma substitute pool, elderly care
